svg.title: Compact crypto-to-naira offramp workflow
svg.desc: Step-by-step flow showing how a user offramps USDC to naira using The Compact protocol with four actors: User, Allocator, Offramp Arbiter, and LP.
svg.text: bank account, NGN amount, order ref, LP address, payment deadline
Trust model: User trusts arbiter to verify NGN receipt honestly. LP trusts allocator
to not leave the lock double-spent. Neither party needs to trust the other.
